Risk_Description: Users may upload images containing personal information or people
Mitigation_Actions: Display a privacy notice and instruct users to upload only building images

Risk_Description: AI may incorrectly recognize a campus building and provide inaccurate information
Mitigation_Actions: Train the AI model with more building images and show a confidence disclaimer

Risk_Description: Third-party assets may not be properly credited
Mitigation_Actions: Maintain an IP register and provide appropriate attribution

Risk_Description: Unauthorized users may gain access to the admin page
Mitigation_Actions: Require administrator authentication and restrict editing permissions

Risk_Description: Campus photos or maps may be used without proper permission
Mitigation_Actions: Use only team-created or authorized campus resources

Risk_Description: Building information in the JSON database may become outdated
Mitigation_Actions: Allow administrators to regularly review and update campus information
